info.name: Book of the Fallen - Oath of Fate
info.description: Contains the Oath of Fate Sacred Oath created specifically for the campaign "Book of the Fallen".

description.p: Paladins who take the Oath of Fate believe they are the hand of destiny, striking down enemies beyond redemption. They believe in their hearts that some creatures, often those who commit atrocities, are fated to die in battle. These paladins are the executioners. Their oath gives them the power to bend destiny in their favor and send foes to their final fate.
The tenets of the Oath of Fate are written in stone on the tombs of paladins undertaking this path.
Embrace Destiny. When bad luck comes your way, understand it was meant to be and search for the opportunity fate has given you within your loss.
Deliver Enemies to Fate. Those who become your enemies aren't long for this world. They must die by your hand.
Accept that which Cannot Change. Fate is a force more powerful than the gods. Accept that there are situations in which you're powerless and take power over that you can influence.
Strength in Numbers. Together with your allies, you have the power to influence fate. Destiny smiles upon those who embrace it.

sheet.description: Paladins who take the Oath of Fate believe they are the hand of destiny, striking down enemies beyond redemption.

description.p: You gain oath spells at the paladin levels listed in the Oath of Fate Spells table. See the Sacred Oath class feature for how oath spells work.

sheet.description: You gain oath spells at the paladin levels listed in the Oath of Fate Spells table.

description.p: When you take this option at 3rd level, you gain the following two Channel Divinity options.

Predestination. As an action, you invoke the divine to shield your allies from misfortune. For 1 minute, you emanate an aura in a 10-foot radius. Friendly creatures within the aura have advantage on saving throws and are immune to the frightened condition.

Fated Death. As an action, you mark a creature you can see within 60 feet as your fated quarry. For 1 minute, you and the target may attack each other with advantage. The target may only attack creatures other than you with disadvantage. If the killing blow against the target is dealt by anyone other than you, Fate intervenes in an unexpected way to alter the outcome.

As an action, you invoke the divine to shield your allies from misfortune. For 1 minute, you emanate an aura in a 10-foot radius. Friendly creatures within the aura have advantage on saving throws and are immune to the frightened condition.

sheet.description: As an action, you emanate a 10-foot aura for 1 minute. Friendly creatures within the aura have advantage on saving throws and are immune to the frightened condition.

description.p: As an action, you mark a creature you can see within 60 feet as your fated quarry. For 1 minute, you and the target may attack each other with advantage. The target may only attack creatures other than you with disadvantage. If the killing blow against the target is dealt by anyone other than you, Fate intervenes in an unexpected way to alter the outcome.

sheet.description: Mark a creature within 60 feet as your fated quarry for 1 minute. You and the target attack each other with advantage. The target attacks all other creatures with disadvantage. If anyone other than you delivers the killing blow, Fate intervenes to alter the outcome.

description.p: Beginning at 7th level, your good fortune guides your hand. Once per turn when you miss with an attack, you can choose to hit instead. When you use this feature, the creature takes extra radiant damage equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of 1). You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (a minimum of once).
You regain any expended uses when you finish a long rest.

sheet.description: Once per turn when you miss with an attack, you can choose to hit instead. When you use this feature, the creature takes {{favor the bold:damage}} extra radiant damage.

description.p: Starting at 15th level, your faith grants you a prophetic glimpse into the future. When you finish a short or long rest, roll one d20 and record the number rolled. You can replace any attack roll, saving throw, or ability check made by you or a creature that you can see with your prophetic roll. You must choose to do so before the roll, and you can use roll in this way only once.
When you finish a short or long rest, you lose any unused prophetic roll.

sheet.description: When you finish a short or long rest, roll one d20 and record the number rolled. You can replace any attack roll, saving throw, or ability check made by you or a creature that you can see with your prophetic roll. You must choose to do so before the roll, and you can use roll in this way only once. When you finish a short or long rest, you lose any unused prophetic roll.

description.p: At 20th level, you become an agent of destiny, heavily influencing the outcome of the events around you. For 1 minute, an argent glow shines dim light from you in 30-foot radius. Whenever an enemy creature starts its turn in your glow, it has disadvantage on attacks and saving throws, while you and friendly creatures have advantage on attack rolls and saving throws. As the glow fades away, you regain all expended uses of Channel Divinity, Favor the Bold, and your Gift of Foresight features.
Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a long rest.

sheet.description: For 1 minute, an argent glow shines dim light from you in 30-foot radius. Whenever an enemy creature starts its turn in your glow, it has disadvantage on attacks and saving throws, while you and friendly creatures have advantage on attack rolls and saving throws. As the glow fades away, you regain all expended uses of Channel Divinity, Favor the Bold, and your Gift of Foresight features.
